title: AREA AGENCY ON AGING - 211info
text: SALEM OFFICE AREA AGENCY ON AGING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Area Agencies on Aging (AAA) provide a range of services to help older adults live safe, healthy, and independent lives. 3410 Cherry Avenue NE Salem, OR 97303 Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 304-3400 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 304-3400 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clatsop, Marion, Polk, Tillamook, and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The two-story building is located just north of the intersection of Cherry Avenue NE and Salem Parkway. The entrance to the complex where the building is located is the first entrance north of Salem Parkway, on the east side of Cherry Avenue. Services: Area Agencies on Aging Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - OREGON MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALEM OFFICE
